aged-paper.$description: Aged Paper — Page canvas and card surfaces — warm off-white replaces sterile pure white, giving the interface a document-like, paper-textured quality

ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Primary text, icon strokes, and the dominant fill across navigation and body copy

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Primary action button background and high-emphasis text — warm near-black that pairs with the cream canvas for a softer than pure-black contrast

ash-gray.$description: Ash Gray — Secondary text, muted icons, and inactive nav fills — carries the warm tint of the palette

stone.$description: Stone — Tertiary/placeholder text and low-emphasis labels

pebble.$description: Pebble — Hairline borders on cards and input containers — warm gray that recedes against the cream canvas

deep-teal.$description: Deep Teal — Sole chromatic accent — active nav indicator and selected state fill, provides the only color punctuation in the interface

pplxsans.$description: All interface text — the deliberately narrow scale (3 sizes, 2 weights) makes the system feel document-like. Weight 400 handles body, labels, and input text; weight 500 is reserved for active/selected states and emphasis. The custom typeface is geometric and humanist, tighter and more distinctive than a system sans like Inter. Normal letter-spacing throughout.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Page background — warm off-white that reads as paper or aged cream

card.$description: Surface level 1: Elevated container surfaces — input fields, status cards, content blocks

subtle-fill.$description: Surface level 2: Active nav item backgrounds, hover states — a barely-visible warm gray
